creator: serg@vostok.net
text:
database/linux-oracle-instantclient-sqlplus port installs two .so libraries in /compat/linux/usr/lib/oracle/10.2.0.2.20060331/client/lib, but doesn't run /compat/linux/sbin/ldconfig after installation.

Fix: 

Add the following lines to Makefile:
INSTALLS_SHLIB=yes
LDCONFIG_DIRS=${INSTLIBSDIR}

INSTALLS_SHLIB/LDCONFIG_DIRS are deprecated, but USE_LDCONFIG doesn't support running linux ldconfig.
How-To-Repeat: Install database/linux-oracle-instantclient-sqlplus port. Try to execute /compat/linux/usr/bin/sqlplus. You will get an error about missing .so libraries.
